title: What is timeout for monday.com Integration recipies request
excerpt: I have an integration recipe failing from some requests. When I see the logs It’s taking about 35 seconds to respond. What is timeout for monday.com integration recipe requests? Does it retry if our request fails after c…

posts.author: yolo (yolo)
posts.cookedHtml: I have an integration recipe failing from some requests. When I see the logs It’s taking about 35 seconds to respond. What is timeout for monday.com integration recipe requests? Does it retry if our request fails after certain time?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @yolo,

Would you be able to please send an email to appsupport@monday.com so we can take a look into this from there?

Please add:

  • Your account ID or name
  • Your user ID or email address
  • The app ID
  • The board ID
  • The automation ID
  • What the app does and which blocks (trigger and action) are being used
  • A timestamps of the last time your recipe was triggered (date, hour, minute, location)

Looking forward to hearing from you over email!

Cheers,
Matias
